  ],

  "summary": "Risk is moderate but concentrated: a single unguarded integration point can take down request handling under load.",
  "issues": [
    {"type": "architecture", "severity": "high", "description": "No circuit breaker on the external payment call.", "impact": "A slow upstream stalls the whole request pool."}
  ],

    {"time": "T+0s", "event": "All services healthy.", "type": "normal"},
    {"time": "T+4m", "event": "Upstream payment provider slows down.", "type": "normal"},
    {"time": "T+7m", "event": "Request threads begin to back up.", "type": "warn"},
    {"time": "T+11m", "event": "Thread pool nears exhaustion.", "type": "warn"},
    {"time": "T+14m", "event": "Health checks start failing intermittently.", "type": "danger"},
    {"time": "T+19m", "event": "Load balancer removes instances from rotation.", "type": "danger"},
    {"time": "T+24m", "event": "Remaining instances overload and crash.", "type": "danger"},

That completes the analysis.
